subcodes.first_line: O God! O Lord of truths and meanings! Look upon this divine assemblage and this heavenly company [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم يا رب الحقايق و المعانی انظر الی ذلک الجمع الرحماني و الحزب الربانی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
